configurations.name: site-dist
runtimeArgs: HUGO=$(command -v hugo || echo /home/mark/bin/hugo); "$HUGO" -s site --gc -d build/public -b "http://localhost:${PORT:-8091}/" && python3 -m http.server "${PORT:-8091}" --directory site/build/public

configurations.name: backend
runtimeArgs: if [ -z "$DATABASE_URL" ]; then export ADMIN_EMAIL=admin@tbb.org ADMIN_PASSWORD=admin-secret-123; fi; ./gradlew :server:run
